Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Sorry, I know you probably aren't very hungry at this hour.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}But, um, I'd be happy if you'd maybe give it a taste, if that's okay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The bento box looks like a[n]chaotic mess of ingredients.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems I have no choice but to eat it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I used vinegar as a base for relieving fatigue, and then added a bunch of citrus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}You know, just some simple, light flavors.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It has a very... impactful flavor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I want your honest opinion, okay? H-How was it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Ngh. I thought you might say that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}Th-Thank you though. For being honest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}Please, let me know if there's anything I can improve on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Actually, you don't look so well, {f 4 1}-kun...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Um, I'll go get some water. Wait right here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I'm sorry I made you taste test my cooking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I just figured that I could count on you for an honest opinion.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Well... Thank you for your time today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I'm going to keep at it. I should focus on making it edible first though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I've gotten a little closer to Fuuka.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I'll see you back at the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go back to the dorm too...[n]{f 1 1}
